query:
INSERT INTO book_file_audiologos
           (file_id, kind, jingle_start_ms, jingle_end_ms,
            padding_ms, method, audiologo_id, confidence,
            head_lands_in_silence, tail_lands_in_silence,
            status, applied_at)
           VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'applied',
                   strftime('%s','now'))
